option.name: originalContent
updatedContent
updatedContent
updatedContent
updatedContent
updatedContent
originalContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<?import javafx.geometry.Insets?> <?import javafx.scene.control.Button?> <?import javafx.scene.control.Label?> <?import javafx.scene.control.Tab?> <?import javafx.scene.control.TabPane?> <?import javafx.scene.control.TextField?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.BorderPane?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.HBox?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.StackPane?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.VBox?>
<BorderPane xmlns="http://javafx.com/javafx/20.0.2" xmlns:fx="http://javafx.com/fxml/1"> <top> <VBox spacing="10.0" styleClass="amateur-page-card"> <padding> <Insets bottom="20.0" left="24.0" right="24.0" top="24.0" /> </padding> <Label styleClass="page-title" text="Découvrir les évènements" /> <HBox spacing="10.0"> <TextField HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS" promptText="Rechercher..." /> <Button mnemonicParsing="false" text="Rechercher" /> </HBox> <TabPane prefHeight="70.0"> <tabs> <Tab closable="false" text="Tous" /> <Tab closable="false" text="Exposition" /> <Tab closable="false" text="Concert" /> <Tab closable="false" text="Spectacle" /> <Tab closable="false" text="Conférence" /> </tabs> </TabPane> </VBox> </top> <center> <VBox spacing="14.0" styleClass="amateur-page-card"> <padding> <Insets bottom="24.0" left="24.0" right="24.0" top="0.0" /> </padding> <StackPane minHeight="320.0" styleClass="empty-state-card"> <Label text="Grille des évènements amateur" /> </StackPane> </VBox> </center> </BorderPane>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<?import javafx.geometry.Insets?> <?import javafx.scene.control.Button?> <?import javafx.scene.control.Label?> <?import javafx.scene.control.ScrollPane?> <?import javafx.scene.control.TextField?> <?import javafx.scene.control.ToggleButton?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.BorderPane?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.FlowPane?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.HBox?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.VBox?>
<BorderPane styleClass="amateur-events-page" xmlns="http://javafx.com/javafx/20.0.2" xmlns:fx="http://javafx.com/fxml/1" fx:controller="controllers.amateur.EventsfrontController"> <top> <VBox spacing="10.0" styleClass="amateur-events-hero"> <padding> <Insets bottom="20.0" left="24.0" right="24.0" top="24.0" /> </padding> <HBox alignment="CENTER_LEFT" spacing="10.0"> <VBox spacing="4.0" HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS"> <Label styleClass="page-title" text="Discover Events" /> <Label styleClass="page-subtitle" text="Explorez les evenements disponibles et trouvez celui qui vous plait." /> </VBox> <Button mnemonicParsing="false" styleClass="amateur-primary-pill" text="Event idea AI powered" /> </HBox>
<HBox spacing="8.0"> <TextField fx:id="searchField" promptText="Search event idea (AI powered)..." styleClass="amateur-search-field" HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS" /> <Button mnemonicParsing="false" onAction="#onSearchClick" styleClass="amateur-search-button" text="Search" /> </HBox>
<HBox spacing="18.0" styleClass="amateur-category-tabs"> <ToggleButton fx:id="allTabButton" mnemonicParsing="false" onAction="#onAllTabClick" styleClass="amateur-tab-button active" text="Tous" /> <ToggleButton fx:id="expositionTabButton" mnemonicParsing="false" onAction="#onExpositionTabClick" styleClass="amateur-tab-button" text="Exposition" /> <ToggleButton fx:id="concertTabButton" mnemonicParsing="false" onAction="#onConcertTabClick" styleClass="amateur-tab-button" text="Concert" /> <ToggleButton fx:id="spectacleTabButton" mnemonicParsing="false" onAction="#onSpectacleTabClick" styleClass="amateur-tab-button" text="Spectacle" /> <ToggleButton fx:id="conferenceTabButton" mnemonicParsing="false" onAction="#onConferenceTabClick" styleClass="amateur-tab-button" text="Conférence" /> </HBox> </VBox> </top> <center> <VBox spacing="14.0" styleClass="amateur-events-body"> <padding> <Insets bottom="24.0" left="24.0" right="24.0" top="0.0" /> </padding>
<Label fx:id="emptyStateLabel" styleClass="section-subtitle" text="Aucun evenement disponible." visible="false" />
<ScrollPane fitToWidth="true" hbarPolicy="NEVER" styleClass="amateur-events-scroll" VBox.vgrow="ALWAYS"> <FlowPane fx:id="eventsFlowPane" hgap="16.0" prefWrapLength="780.0" styleClass="amateur-events-flow" vgap="16.0"> <padding> <Insets bottom="8.0" left="2.0" right="2.0" top="8.0" /> </padding> </FlowPane> </ScrollPane> </VBox> </center> </BorderPane>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<?import javafx.geometry.Insets?> <?import javafx.scene.control.Label?> <?import javafx.scene.image.ImageView?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.HBox?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.Region?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.StackPane?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.VBox?>
<VBox prefWidth="260.0" spacing="10.0" styleClass="amateur-event-card" xmlns="http://javafx.com/javafx/20.0.2" xmlns:fx="http://javafx.com/fxml/1" fx:controller="controllers.amateur.EventCardController"> <padding> <Insets bottom="10.0" left="10.0" right="10.0" top="10.0" /> </padding>
<StackPane prefHeight="185.0" styleClass="amateur-event-cover"> <ImageView fx:id="coverImageView" fitHeight="185.0" fitWidth="240.0" pickOnBounds="true" preserveRatio="true" /> <Label fx:id="categoryBadgeLabel" styleClass="amateur-event-badge" text="Exposition" StackPane.alignment="TOP_LEFT" /> </StackPane>
<HBox alignment="CENTER_LEFT" spacing="8.0"> <Label fx:id="titleLabel" styleClass="amateur-event-title" text="Titre" wrapText="true" /> <Region HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS" /> <StackPane styleClass="amateur-details-chip"> <Label text="⌗" /> </StackPane> </HBox>
<VBox spacing="6.0"> <Label fx:id="dateLabel" styleClass="amateur-event-meta" text="Date" wrapText="true" /> <Label fx:id="placeLabel" styleClass="amateur-event-meta" text="100 places" wrapText="true" /> </VBox>
<HBox alignment="CENTER_LEFT"> <Label fx:id="statusLabel" styleClass="amateur-event-status" text="A venir" /> <Region HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS" /> <Label fx:id="priceLabel" styleClass="amateur-event-price" text="20 TND" /> </HBox>
<Label fx:id="descriptionLabel" styleClass="amateur-event-description" text="Description" wrapText="true" /> </VBox>

option.name: originalContent
updatedContent
